description:
New src/ir_interp_v2.rs (will replace src/ir_interp.rs eventually). Walks fz_ir::Module. Uses FzValue for all values, calls into ir_runtime FFI fns for the cases where the JIT FFI is the cleanest semantics carrier (alloc, arith). Per-Process heap shared with the JIT via the same heap.rs.

Scope of THIS atom: enough to make add1.fz pass.

  fn add1(n) do n + 1 end
  fn main() do print(add1(41)) end

Needed primitives: Const::Int, BinOp::Add, Stmt::Call (user fn), Term::Return, Prim::Print, frame alloc (via existing fz_alloc_frame).

## Acceptance

- `fz interp fixtures/add1.fz` prints `42` and exits 0.
- fixtures/add1.fz header updated to `# paths: jit, interp`.
- Matrix green via both paths.
title: Skeleton IR interpreter on FzValue — pass add1.fz via interp
